title: Anvil Display
description: Adds useful information about anvil mechanics to the tooltips of some items.
body:
### Overview

Adds useful information about anvil mechanics to the tooltips of enchantable equipment and enchanted books


The information added to the tooltips include:
-  **Anvil Uses**: Amount of times an item has been used in an anvil.
-  **Base Cost**: The base experience cost of an item in an anvil.

The tooltip's color will also reflect how optimized the enchantments are.  
It will be *green* if the item has the minimum amount of anvil uses for it's enchants, *yellow* if it has one extra anvil use and *red* otherwise.

For any issues or suggestions, please join my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/3GxfGcAJBN)
